title: Better End Cities (BetterEnd)
description: Spices up the look of End Cities using the BetterEnd Mod
body:
After IchPhilipp disappeared from every platform, I chose to recreate their "Better End City - For Better End" datapack from old videos and screenshots.

This pack is as close to the original as I could get it without an intact version of their original pack.

This makes the End Cities far cooler when encountered

For compatibility with "Lootr", You must download and use this datapack: https://www.planetminecraft.com/data-pack/lootr-compatibility-pack-for-betterend-fabric/
